subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from before the Youth unto him who hath turned toward the Dayspring of grace and whom the breezes of revelation have seized in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الغلام الی من توجه الی مشرق الفضل و اخذته نفحات الوحی فی هذه
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement
